message:
feat(registry): add hard capacity limits to EcosystemRegistry, ComputationRegistry, and EvictionSagaManager

Three registries that previously grew without bound now have hard caps:
- EcosystemRegistry: MAX_EXTENSIONS=8192, returns RegistryFull when exceeded
  (duplicate-check still runs first)
- ComputationRegistry: MAX_COMPUTATION_ENTRIES=4096 with same ordering
- EvictionSagaManager: MAX_SAGAS=4096 with automatic eviction of oldest
  terminal-phase saga (Complete/Compensated/Failed by creation-order
  sequence number); rejects if no terminal entry exists

Each registry gained matching capacity and eviction tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
